note: Placeholder trigger-evaluation prompts. Real assertions + baselines land in Unit 8 via skill-creator:skill-creator.

cases.prompt: ship a keyboard shortcut help modal end-to-end — run the whole CE pipeline
cases.rationale: Explicit request for end-to-end CE pipeline with unspecified stage; classic bare-idea entry point.

cases.prompt: take docs/plans/2026-04-15-002-feat-search-plan.md and run it through to PR
cases.rationale: Plan path + 'run it through to PR' signals downstream orchestration; plan-approval gate still applies.

cases.prompt: streak counter resets to 0 after midnight UTC — diagnose, fix, review, open PR
cases.rationale: Bug description + multi-stage workflow (diagnose → fix → review → PR) matches the debug-input path.
BMAD story path + 'compound engineering' → v2 story-file bridge.

cases.prompt: run every.to's compound engineering workflow on this idea: dark-mode toggle
cases.rationale: 'every.to compound engineering workflow' is a direct reference to the pipeline this skill chains.

cases.prompt: brainstorm ideas for improving the course-import flow
cases.rationale: Single-stage request — user wants /ce-brainstorm directly, not the full pipeline.

cases.prompt: write a plan for adding dark mode
cases.rationale: Explicit single-stage: planning only. No pipeline signaled.
Unrelated utility request — must not over-trigger.
User explicitly named /lfg. Should not hijack — ce-orchestrator only triggers when user asks for the full pipeline.

assertions.description: Assertions will be generated by skill-creator in Unit 8. Target: ≥80% trigger accuracy on this case set.
